titleStmt.title: SII 9.341: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 341. (A.R. No. 447 of 1914.) ON A PILLAR OF THE MUKHAMANDAPA IN THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT SOGI, HADAGALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated the 6th year of the Hoysaḷa king Vīra-Narasiṁha, the cyclic year Vyaya, Chaitra, śu. 10, Sōmavāra. The date works out correctly only for A.D. 1226, March 9 Monday, f.d.t. ·44. And so the king in whose reign the record is dated must be Vīra-Narasiṁha II. Under the orders of Bommaya-Daṇṇāyaka, the Mahāpradhāna of the king, and with the consent of Gōparasa, Bhūtarasa, Hēmayya and Maṅgaṭeyya, Siripaṇṇa, the officer of tolls, Mailāradēva and others made a grant of 2 gadyāṇas each year out of the tolls-revenue in Pāṇḍya-nāḍu for the service of the god Kalidēva of Sōge. Similarly the Heggaḍe Dēvayya and others made a grant of 2 gadyāṇas for the service of the same god under the orders of Hiriyaṇṇa, the Heggaḍe of Boppaya-Daṇṇāyaka, who was the officer of the bilukoḍe tax.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrījayābhyudayaśca . śrīmatpratāpacakrava
rtti hoysaṇavīranārasiṁhadēvavarṣada 6 neya byayasauṁ
tsarada caitra suddha 10 sōmavāradaṁdu śrīmanamahāpradhā
naṁ rāyabhūbaḷagajāṁkuśa vijayavinōdi boṁmaya
da(ṁ)ṇnāyakara besadiṁ gōparasa bhūtarasa tigaṭeyyana hēmayya
maṁgaṭeyyaṁgaḷayappaṇeyiṁ śrīmatu pāṇḍyanāḍa suṁ
kādhikāri siripaṇnamaylāradēva divakaradēva mallayyahe
ggaḍegaḷu sōgveya śrisvayaṁbhukalināthadēvaraṁgabhōganivēdyakkaṁ biṭṭa da
ttiyā pāṁḍyanāḍa paḍikēṇiya sthaḷada kōgaḷināḍa davasā
yadoḷage variśaṁprati nibaṁdhavāgi saluva gadyāṇaveraḍuyā bi
lukoḍeyadhikāri boppayadaṇnāyakara hegaḍe hariyaṇnaṁga
ḷappaṇeyiṁ heggaḍe dēvaya koṁmaya nellakūḷa mādayya
ṁgaḷuṁ yā davasāyadalu koṭṭa gadyāṇameraḍu Anta ga 4
vaṁ Āvadhikāri baṁdaḍaṁ kēṇivoḷageḷihi pratipāḷisuvaru yī
dharmmavanu pāḷisuvaru pāḷisadirdaḍe vāraṇāsilu kavileya koṁda
ru . maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.341 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
